name: Hot Chicken Wings
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut the chicken wings in two at the joints.
2. Heat oil or shortening to 360°F (175°C) in a large frying pan or skillet.
3. Add the wings and fry until crisp, about 12-15 minutes.
- To bake: Preheat oven to 450°F (230°C). Place wings in a single layer on a baking sheet and bake for 45 minutes.
4. Combine Tabasco sauce and melted butter in a bowl. Mix well.
5. Once the chicken wings are cooked, pour the sauce over them and serve immediately.
